sentences.english: I volunteer at an animal shelter every Saturday.
It's hard work but it feels so rewarding.
I used to volunteer at a soup kitchen in college.
sentences.korean: 대학교 때 무료 급식소에서 봉사하곤 했어요.

sentences.english: It really opened my eyes to how many people need help.
sentences.korean: 얼마나 많은 사람들이 도움이 필요한지 눈을 뜨게 해줬어요.

sentences.english: I want to volunteer, but I honestly can't find the time with my job and kids.
sentences.korean: 봉사하고 싶지만 솔직히 일과 아이들 때문에 시간이 안 나요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
